metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.17-beta.21
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Detects covers beside audio and in numbered sibling Artwork directories. - Keeps automatic and manual Artwork isolated per physical source folder. - Invalidates older negative Artwork results so existing libraries retry. - Adds threshold-based smart source tails for waveform-selection Transfer.
